name: DC Hub Nexus
description: Data Center Intelligence Platform - Access 50,000+ global data center facilities, real-time market intelligence, M&A transactions, news, infrastructure data, and industry-first site risk scoring (water, seismic, hazard, climate) via MCP.

tools.name: search_facilities
tools.description: Search data center facilities by location, provider, or capacity

tools.name: get_facility
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific data center facility

tools.name: list_transactions
tools.description: List recent M&A transactions and deals in the data center industry

tools.name: get_market_intel
tools.description: Get market intelligence and trends for data center markets

tools.name: get_news
tools.description: Get latest data center industry news and announcements

tools.name: analyze_site
tools.description: Analyze a location for data center site suitability

tools.name: get_water_risk
tools.description: Assess water availability and drought risk using live USGS groundwater and streamflow data

tools.name: get_disaster_risk
tools.description: Assess seismic safety (USGS 20-year history) and FEMA 7-hazard natural disaster risk

tools.name: get_climate_intel
tools.description: Get cooling efficiency data: CDD, free cooling hours, PUE estimate from NOAA 30-year normals

tools.name: get_composite_site_score
tools.description: Industry-first composite site risk score (0-100, A-F grade) combining water, seismic, hazard, and climate

tools.name: get_site_comparison
tools.description: Compare 2-5 data center sites head-to-head with ranked composite scores

authentication.note: Free tier available, API keys optional for higher rate limits
